zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert de Bures於1476年出生在英國素福爾可阿克頓時，他的父親William De Bures II50歲，母親Lady Joan Markham40歲。他於大約1502年與Lady Joan Buck在英國英格蘭素福爾可阿克頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1524年7月10日在他的家鄉享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert de Bures于1476年出生在英国素福爾可阿克頓时，他的父亲William De Bures II50岁，母亲Lady Joan Markham40岁。他于大约1502年与Lady Joan Buck在英国英格兰素福爾可阿克頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1524年7月10日在他的家乡享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bures
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Czech and Slovak Milan, Jaroslav.
Czech and Slovak (Bureš): from a pet form of the old personal name Burian .
English (Essex): habitational name from Mount Bures (Essex) and adjacent Bures Saint Mary (Suffolk), both meaning ‘the cottages’, from Old English būr, plural būras.

variants.name: Burian
meanings: Czech and Slovak (also Burián); Hungarian (Burián); Polish and Romanian: from Burian, Burián, an old personal name apparently composed of bur ‘peasant’, a word of German origin (see Bauer and Bur ), and the name Jan (Slovak Ján) ‘John’. In Czech, the name Burian or Bur Jan denotes Saint John, a Christian martyr who lived in the 4th century in Rome and is venerated together with Saint Paul. Compare German Burhans and the name below.
North German: variant of   Burhans  , formed with the personal name   Jan   ‘John’ in place of its cognate   Hans  .

variants.name: Buresh
meanings: Americanized form of Czech and Slovak Bureš (see Bures ) and of their Germanized form Buresch (compare 2 below).

Americanized form of German (of Slavic origin) Buresch: from a short form of an Old Slavic personal name Burislav (composed of the elements bur, derived from buriti se ‘to stir up’ + slav, from slava ‘glory’). See also 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: ‘light; beauty; prosperity’, also ‘rank, power, royal majesty’, a byname of the goddesses Lakshmi and Saraswati. Also widely used as an honorific title.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert de Bures was born in 1476, in Acton, Suffolk, England, his father, William De Bures II, was 50 and his mother, Lady Joan Markham, was 40. He married Lady Joan Buck about 1502, in Acton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 8 daughters. He died on 10 July 1524, in his hometown, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert de Bures est né en 1476, à Acton, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, William De Bures II, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Lady Joan Markham, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Lady Joan Buck environ 1502, à Acton, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé le 10 juillet 1524, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 48 ans.

Er hat um 1502 in Acton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Lady Joan Buck geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb am 10. Lui sposato Lady Joan Buck circa 1502, nel Acton, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 10 luglio 1524, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 48 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Bures(이)가 1476년 영국 수폴크 악턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William De Bures II(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Joan Markham(은)는 40세였다. 그는 대략 1502년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 악턴에서 Lady Joan Buck(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1524년 7월 10일 그의 고향에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Lady Joan Buck aproximadamente 1502, em Acton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 8 filhas. ru.Bures Saint Mary, Babergh, Suffolk, Engl: буресь сеинт мэри, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert de Bures родился в 1476 г. в местности актон, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени William De Bures II было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Joan Markham, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Joan Buck около 1502 г. в местности актон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 8 дочерей. Он умер 10 июля 1524 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 48 лет.

Se casó con Lady Joan Buck aproximadamente 1502, en Acton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 8 hijas.
